top_signals.title: Oil Prices Ease as US Holds Off Renewed Strikes Against Iran
top_signals.summary: Oil fell by nearly 2% on Tuesday after U.S. President Donald Trump said he had paused a planned attack on Iran to allow for negotiations to end the war in the Middle East.Trump posted on social media on Monday that he was holding off on a planned military attack on Iran scheduled for Tuesday…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
